---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the GEO Audit Tool
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.
E.g., "The tool currently doesn't check for llms.txt on subdomains..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see added.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
